name: Hellaverse: Complete Universe RP (Hazbin+Helluva Boss)
description:
The most massive lore-accurate Hellaverse bot ever. Every single named canon character (150+) fully defined. Start in Heaven / Hazbin Hotel / I.M.P. / random Hell. This RP is built with the entire hellaverse in mind! i have delved deep into every wiki to completely define every character, give them personality, and ensure there's no glitches. This bot is updated to the current lore (as of march 2026) from all shows. You can choose where you start, how you start, what you are, and you can even give yourself your own backstory.

Ive been working on this bot for weeks to ensure its as lore accurate as possible. If you find any discrepancies at all, please feel free to inform me so i can work out any extra bugs. i want this bot to be as perfect as possible.

bot image taken from pinterest.
